svg.text: Observed pairwise free-energy chemistry map: fingerprint similarity projection
Nodes: 66 observed runtime/panel ligands; fingerprints: 58. X = similarity to JTY027_aniline_diF_2Me_benzamide; Y = similarity to JTY023_pyrazine_tail.
Important: panel-local relative dG values are not globally rank-comparable across different pairwise reference frames.
